sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35072" key="e)nau/w3" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναύω</orth> (C), <sense id="n35072.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἱκετεύω πρὸς τοῖς ναοῖς</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
